name: @litsx/babel-plugin-transform-litsx-scoped-elements
description: Transforms LitElement classes to include scoped elements metadata
author: LitSX Team

scripts.build: ../../node_modules/.bin/tsup src/index.js --format cjs --out-dir dist --clean --external @babel/core --external @babel/types --external @babel/generator --external @babel/helper-plugin-utils --external @babel/plugin-syntax-jsx --external lit --external react --external typescript
